codeReview.summary: The follow-up resolves the three prior blocking issues. `src/app/page.tsx` now renders the atlas workspace before the hero/proof sections, `gate-valuation` now targets a dedicated `valuation` graph node wired to actual valuation content, and `GraphShell`'s `RESTORE_HASH` path now rehydrates or deactivates guided-path state coherently for hash/back-forward navigation. I did not find new blocking regressions in scope relative to VAL-ROADMAP-014, VAL-ROADMAP-015, VAL-ROADMAP-017, or VAL-CROSS-014.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker reported `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true`, but the transcript skeleton does not show the required library/design-system reads for a landing/shell change before implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/test/vision/.factory/skills/frontend-experience-worker/SKILL.md:20-22` requires reading relevant `.factory/library/*.md` files and specifically reviewing `.factory/library/design-system.md` when changing the landing page/hero/shell. In `/Users/test/.factory/missions/33dae310-26cf-4368-9488-64b235b6db83/worker-transcripts.jsonl:67`, the fix session records `Execute "ls /Users/test/vision/.factory/library/"` and then moves into source/test reads and implementation, but it does not record a `Read` of `design-system.md` or another library markdown file before the edits.

summary: Pass. The rerun makes the default landing genuinely graph-first, routes the guided Valuation gate to real valuation content, and restores guided-path state coherently on hash/back-forward without introducing new blocking regressions in the reviewed scope.
